task: Produce an auditable, reproducible derivation workbook/script and concise expert memo to resolve edge-case oncology line-of-therapy classifications using only the embedded packet. Deliverables: lot_derivation_table.csv (row-level calculations, citations, validation checks, sensitivity analyses, final decision table) and derivation_memo.md (assumptions, methods, results, signoff-ready expert summary). Follow the named thresholds exactly, do not impute missing values or use outside data, combine remediation options only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd, and flag for expert review if any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift. Document every assumption and mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
